creator: bsam@passap.ru
text:
29.01.2012 23:34, Ruslan Mahmatkhanov Ð¿Ð¸ÑÐµÑ:
> Boris Samorodov wrote on 29.01.2012 23:19:
>>> Number:         164609
>>> Category:       ports
>>> Synopsis:       [patch] print/scribus: update to version 1.4.0
> 
> Looks like a duplicate of http://bugs.freebsd.org/164592. Boris, is 
> there any differences/improvements in your patch that's missed in 
> ports/164592 patch?

1. They are almost the same. However it's not easy to compare them
since I tried to patch the files/ directory while PR/164592
PR remove all patches and create a new ones.

2. MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=YES is defined at the PR/164592.

3. USE_LDCONFIG=YES also is defined at the PR/164592.

4. DOCSDIR=${PREFIX}/share/doc/${PORTNAME} is defined but seems to be
a default.

That's all in brief.

-- 
WBR, Boris Samorodov (bsam)
FreeBSD Committer, http://www.FreeBSD.org The Power To Serve
